name: We Are Square
short_description: WARNING: This game will destroy friendships. In We Are Square you and up to seven friends must work together to control one square and platform yourselves to the goal.
detailed_description:
Hey Listen: The demo for this game is the full game. Only purchase if you want to support future games.

WARNING: This game will destroy friendships.

In We Are Square you and up to seven friends must work together to control one square and platform yourselves to the goal.

Featuring:

  • Exactly 1 music track!

  • Over 24 levels! (there are 25 levels... and some of them are jokes)

  • Enough tricky platforming to make you hate your friends!

  • A "Blame Screen" after every death to let you know which of your friends is holding you back!

  • Designed for local co-op but works with Steam's Remote Play feature

Gamepads are required. Due to coding weirdness, only 4 controllers can be Xbox controllers. For 5+ player gameplay, PlayStation or generic gamepads must be used.
